description: Automotive: new/used cars, F&I products, dealership operations

items.name: Test drive conversion
items.tactic: Test drive = 65% close rate. Setup: comfortable, no pressure, competitive comparison available.

items.name: Finance & Insurance (F&I)
items.tactic: Most profit = F&I (warranty, gap insurance, coating). Pitch after vehicle locked. "Protect your investment."

items.name: Trade-in negotiation
items.tactic: Trade-in is leverage. Show: KBB value, market comps, condition. Let buyer feel they got good deal.
